completed_slice: Added a credential-free composed public deployment proof runner that collects bounded hostname evidence, conditionally fetches the served manifest, preserves transport and parse failures, and emits the exact-commit classifier packet.
verification: Source and fixture readback completed. Runtime passage is not claimed because no successful CI test run was observed and the local environment could not resolve github.com for checkout.
remaining_blocker: The actual Cloudflare hostname and cloudflare-research environment credentials remain unavailable. Configure CLOUDFLARE_ACCOUNT_ID and CLOUDFLARE_API_TOKEN, deploy, then execute the runner with the actual hostname and expected source commit.
next_action: Wire the runner into the Cloudflare deployment workflow after deployment URL capture, execute its committed tests in CI, and retain the resulting proof packet as an artifact.
